pricing.title: Plans & pricing
pricing.pageSub: Free during launch. Subscriptions begin after our first 100 members.
pricing.successFee: 2% success fee on all closed rounds — charged to the founder only, after capital is received.
pricing.winHeadline: We only win when you win.
pricing.ctaHeadline: Ready to find your next investment?

faq.q1: How does the 2% success fee work?
faq.a1: When an investor marks a deal as closed, we invoice the startup for 2% of the amount raised — after closing. 14-day payment window via Stripe. Zero upfront fees.
faq.a2: We're waiving subscription fees entirely for our first 100 members. Everyone gets full access to the top tier at no cost. Once we hit 100 members, regular pricing kicks in for new signups.
faq.q3: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a3: Yes. Cancel from your dashboard via the Stripe Customer Portal at any time. You retain access until the end of your billing period.
faq.q4: What counts as a 'closed deal' for the 2% fee?
faq.a4: A deal is closed when both parties confirm the investment was completed through a CapitalReach connection. We don't charge for deals made outside the platform.
faq.q5: Do investors pay the success fee?
faq.a5: No. The 2% fee is charged only to startups. Investors pay zero transaction fees.
faq.a6: Investors must self-certify as accredited to access financial data. CapitalReach stores this certification and may request documentation for institutional accounts.

onboarding.investorStep1Sub: Help founders understand your thesis and criteria.

su.h1Sub: Tell investors who you are and what you're building.
su.taglinePh: We make X 10x faster for Y
su.companyDescPh: 2–3 sentences about what your company does, who it serves, and why now.
su.h2Sub: Investors bet on people first. Add founders and key team members.
su.bioPh: Former CTO at Stripe. Stanford CS. Passionate about developer infrastructure.
su.addFounder: Add another founder or key hire
su.h3Sub: Help investors understand the opportunity you're going after.
su.problemHint: What painful problem are you solving? Who experiences it?
su.solutionHint: How do you solve it? What's the core innovation?
su.marketHint: Who is your ideal customer? What's the TAM/SAM/SOM?
su.advantageHint: What makes you defensible? IP, data network effects, switching costs?
su.competitorsHint: Who else is in this space? What's your key differentiator vs each?
su.h4Sub: Share your real numbers. Pre-revenue startups are welcome.
su.h5Sub: How much are you raising, and on what terms?
su.useOfFundsHint: How will you deploy the capital? Be specific.
su.feeBody: By listing on CapitalReach, you agree to pay a 2% fee on the total amount raised through the platform when a deal is marked as closed. This is invoiced after closing — zero upfront cost.
su.h6Sub: Add links to your pitch deck, demo, and social presence. You can update these from your dashboard any time.
su.uploadTitle: Pitch deck, financial model, cap table
su.uploadSub: File uploads available in your dashboard after profile creation
su.pitchDeckHint: Docsend, Notion, Google Drive, or similar
su.h7Sub: Start free — upgrade anytime to unlock more profile sections, investor visibility, and AI tools.
su.unlocksTitle: What each plan unlocks for your profile:
su.planFreeDesc: Create your profile and get reviewed by our team.
su.planStarterDesc: Live public profile, searchable by all investors.
su.planGrowthDesc: Featured placement, AI pitch feedback, and full analytics.
su.fl1: Pitch deck & financials visible to investors
su.sf1: Public listing visible to all investors
su.gf2: Full financials visible (MRR, ARR, growth, runway)
su.submitted: Profile submitted! We'll review and approve your listing within 1–2 business days.

inv.h1: What type of investor are you?
inv.h1Sub: This helps us tailor your experience and match you to the right deal flow.
inv.typeVcDesc: Institutional fund deploying LP capital, typically $500K+
inv.typeFoDesc: Private wealth management for high-net-worth families
inv.typeCorpDesc: Investment arm of a corporation seeking strategic alignment
inv.h2Sub: We use these to surface the most relevant startups for you.
inv.leadRoundsSub: I'm willing to be the lead investor and set terms
inv.h3Sub: Startups will see this when you reach out. Be specific about your background.
inv.bioHint: Tell founders who you are and what you bring beyond capital.
inv.thesisHint: What patterns, missions, or founders do you get excited about?
inv.h4Sub: Share your track record and how you work with portfolio companies.
inv.portfolioHint: Up to 10 companies you've invested in
inv.followOnYes: Yes — I actively reserve capital for follow-ons
inv.followOnNo: No — I only lead or participate in initial rounds
inv.boardOpen: Open to board or observer roles
inv.boardNo: Prefer not to take board seats
inv.holdPeriodPh: e.g. 5–7 years, until exit or IPO
inv.h5Sub: Required by securities regulations in most jurisdictions to access private investment opportunities.
inv.legalReqBody: To access full startup profiles, financial data, pitch decks, and direct communication with founders, you must self-certify as an accredited investor under applicable securities law.
inv.accBody: I certify that I meet one of the following criteria: (a) net worth exceeding $1M excluding primary residence, (b) annual income exceeding $200K ($300K jointly with spouse) for the past two years with reasonable expectation of the same this year, or (c) I am a licensed investment professional (Series 65, 82, or equivalent).
inv.riskBody: I understand that investments in early-stage private companies are highly speculative, illiquid, and involve significant risk of loss. I may lose my entire investment. I am making investment decisions independently and am not relying on CapitalReach for investment advice.
inv.certNote: This self-certification is stored securely and may be subject to verification for institutional members.
inv.h6Sub: Unlock more deal flow, AI tools, and direct access to founders.
inv.planExplorerDesc: Browse the marketplace and see startup cards.
inv.planAngelDesc: Full startup profiles and direct messaging.
inv.planProDesc: The full deal flow experience with AI superpowers.
inv.planInstDesc: Unlimited access, integrations, and a dedicated team.
inv.ef3: Use AI pitch analyzer & matching tools
inv.created: Profile created! Start discovering startups on CapitalReach.
